title: Health/Disability Related Counseling * Parkinson's Disease - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Health/Disability Related Counseling * Parkinson's Disease 2 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions Parkinson's Disease AIDS/HIV Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF PARKINSON'S RESOURCES OF OREGON HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides support and services for patients and families living with a diagnosis of Parkinson's disease. Services include support groups, exercise and speech classes, education workshops, case management, and counseling. Offers hybrid formats, online, in-person groups, and outdoor activities. 8880 SW Nimbus Avenue Suite B Beaverton, OR 97008 Eligibility: Individuals with Parkinson's Disease and their caregivers and friends Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 594-0901 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PARKINSON'S RESOURCES OF OREGON PARKINSON'S RESOURCES OF OREGON CENTRAL OREGON HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides support and services for patients and families living with a diagnosis of Parkinson's disease. Services include support groups, exercise and speech classes, education workshops, case management, and counseling. Offers hybrid formats, online, in-person groups, and outdoor activities. 354 NE Greenwood Avenue #108 Bend, OR 97701 Eligibility: Individuals with Parkinson's Disease and their caregivers and friends Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm by appointment Email (541) 668-6599 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PARKINSON'S RESOURCES OF OREGON HEALTH SERVICES PARKINSON'S RESOURCES OF OREGON HEALTH SERVICES
